---
title: "Large-scale experimental tests of network resilience in a novel ecosystem in Hawaii"
image: "../images/card_pics/rble_001.jpg"
description: "The project manipulates plant–seed disperser interactions in a novel ecosystem to uncover mechanisms of community stability, resilience, and recovery—offering large-scale, real-world insight into how biodiversity supports ecosystem function under change."
categories: ["Hawaii VINE Project"]
contributors: "Zach Holmes, Garrett Higgins, Corey Tarwater, Jinelle Sperry, Jeferson Vizentin-Bugoni, Jeff Foster, Don Drake"
feature_order: "c"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
